He says "I saw a copycat in this location" and "I saw werewolf in that location" - wait, he says "I saw cards in the middle" at [19], then later at [61-63] he says "I saw a copycat in this location" and "I saw werewolf in that location").

        *   If Tyler is the Seer and saw a Werewolf in the center, then there is no Werewolf.

parsed_output.justification: Tyler claims to be the Seer and states he saw cards in the middle. Specifically, he mentions seeing a Copycat and a Werewolf in the center, which he uses to argue that Justin is lying about being the Copycat. If Tyler is the Seer and saw the Werewolf card in the center, then no player is currently a Werewolf. According to the rules, Team Village wins if no player is a Werewolf and no one is voted out.
